Class AuthResponseDto

java.lang.Object
com.sait.workshop05.api.dto.AuthResponseDto
public class AuthResponseDto extends Object
Maps fields returned after successful login. Extra JSON fields are ignored.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    AuthResponseDto()
    Creates an empty auth response DTO for JSON binding.
